chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 181 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 22.05.2019. Mr. Ghulam Muhammad Khan Jadoon, Advocate for petitioner alongwith petitioner. Mr. Kashif Hussain Agha, Advocate alongwith respondents No.12 & 13. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G. alongwith SIP Muhammad Yakoob PS Market. = After arguing the case at some length, the parties have aggrieved for disposal of this petition in terms whereby no harassment would be caused to the petitioner and due protection in accordance with law would be provided to him by the official respondents. As there is a long standing civil as well as criminal litigation between the petitioner and private respondents which is pending in different courts of law at Karachi, the parties have agreed to assert their rights in the said courts instead of taking recourse to police otherwise than due course of law for settling their disputes. Accordingly, the petition stands disposed of in the terms as stated above. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail/PA
